summary: The diff implements REQ-2 (Layout.tsx principal display and logout) and REQ-3 (non-blocking banner for unauthenticated users with localStorage favorites fallback) correctly. REQ-1 (a prominent centered login gate blocking content when unauthenticated) is NOT implemented — instead, the implementation shows a non-blocking banner (REQ-3 behavior) rather than the required blocking login prompt. The KD Trust page always renders full content regardless of authentication state, contradicting REQ-1's requirement for a prominent login gate that gates access to content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a login gate to the KD Trust page: when the user is not authenticated via Internet Identity, display a prominent centered prompt with a 'Login with Internet Identity' button. After successful login, the user sees the full KD Trust dashboard and AI Hub content.
missing_requirements.reason: The KDTrustPage.tsx diff shows that the full dashboard and AI Hub content is always rendered regardless of authentication state. The unauthenticated state only shows a non-blocking banner (which satisfies REQ-3), not a prominent centered login gate that blocks content. The acceptance criteria require that unauthenticated users see a prominent login prompt instead of the full content.
